2133180.name: Temporal Riff
2133180.description: In a surreal universe where music comes to life, Ada must use her cunning and agility to sneak through an army of mysterious musical agents.  Playable in third-person or first-person in VR, you must follow the musical soundtrack to help guide Ada though unharmed. Armed with a musical spray paint, the ability to see music and a electrified hook gun, you will need to alter the musical landscape save her father from the clutches of an evil Artificial Intelligence.  Are you ready to face the music?
2133180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
